Table of Contents

Enum esriTinNodeEditInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Esri TIN node edit info.

[Guid("08F07276-EBDB-44E3-8F1E-54F164F49CA8")]
public enum esriTinNodeEditInfo

Fields

esriTinNodeCoincident = 128

128: More than one points lie on the same location.

esriTinNodeDensified = 8

8: Densified node.

esriTinNodeIntersection = 32

32: Intersection of two or more enforced lines.

esriTinNodeLineEnforce = 16

16: Densified node due to line enforcement.

esriTinNodeLineTouch = 64

64: Point lies on the interior of an enforced edge (exclude the two end nodes of the edge).

esriTinNodeModified = 512

512: Point's coords have been modified (snapping to an existing enforced edge, for example).

esriTinNodeOriginal = 4

4: Original input.

esriTinNodeSnap = 256

256: Other node(s) of different coords has been snapped to this node (position).

esriTinNodeSuperNode = 2

2: Super node.

esriTinNodeUnknown = 1

1: Source unknown.
